calibration_instruction: Play on one string of your guitar as accurately as possible on the beat. This helps Neckspert improve timing accuracy for scoring.
calibration_hit_prompt: Hit the string on each beat.
calibration_inconsistent: Timing was too inconsistent. Try again and play as close to the beat as you can.
calibration_no_sound_mic: Could not access the microphone. Check browser permissions, your audio interface, and gain settings. Firefox can sometimes have issues with audio.
calibration_no_sound_silent: No sound detected. Check your guitar's volume, audio interface gain, browser permissions, and try again. Firefox can have compatibility issues.
